subcodes.first_line: A wondrous remembrance from the servant unto him who hath believed in God and was among the guided ones, inscribed in the Tablets of the Spirit [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر بدیع من العبد الی الذی آمن باللّه و کان من المهتدین فی الواح الرّوح مسطورا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @Manifestation of God as mediator, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
